Incredibly slow! Hahahaha....

Immensely powerful 360 lightning! Can NOT be replicated in the pirate bay.

Default Weapons

WeaponStart levelSlotType
Larva Lightning01beam

Default Upgrades

TechStart levelWhat it gives
Armor6Increases health and armor amount. Armor reduces damage by its value per hit. - Can restore health. - armor bonuses scale with player level. Good vs fast hitting weapons.
Shield0Increases shield amount and regeneration rate. - Can block heavy hits. - Shield Bonuses scale with player level. Good vs hard hitting weapons.
Engine0Increases acceleration and speed. - Can boost speed. Good in PvP.
Power0Increases power regeneration and maximum power. - Can boost damage output at the cost of power. Good for dealing more damage for longer periods.

TraitBonus
Refire / reload50%
Energy damage125%
Max power40%
